title: Becton Dickinson India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Becton Dickinson India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Becton Dickinson India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Becton Dickinson India:
Becton Dickinson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Becton Dickinson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
